sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77233" key="panamei/liktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰν-ᾰμείλικτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n77233.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">all-implacable</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δράκαινα</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:223" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">223</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
